feedback.details: Diagram validates successfully with mmdc (exit 0) at /tmp/validate.svg. No syntax errors detected.

All 10 required containers present with technology stacks: API Gateway (line 11), Real-time Routing Container (line 12), Local Model Adapter (line 13), Frontier Model Adapter (line 14), Nomad Job Definition (line 15), Consul Integration (line 16), Vault Integration (line 17), Prometheus Metrics Exporter (line 18), Langfuse Trace Collector (line 19), Offline Self-Learning Container (line 20).

All protocols correctly specified: HTTP/1.1 (lines 34,35,47,49), gRPC (lines 31,32,33), Nomad SDK (line 46), Consul API (lines 37,38,44,45), Vault API (lines 39,40), Prometheus PushGateway (line 41), Langfuse API (lines 42,43). Directionality matches PRD Section 4.3.

Diagram includes /v1/* endpoints (line 11, 55), two-part architecture with Real-time Routing Container (line 12) and Offline Self-Learning Container (line 20), Nomad 3-node cluster (line 22), and infrastructure dependencies (lines 23-24).

All required labels present: Golang/bifrost/1B model (line 12), vLLM/llama.cpp (line 13), NormStat/VecStat (line 12), hardware telemetry (line 12), background agent (line 20), Docker annotation on all containers (lines 11-20).

Legend present (line 5). Minor issue: container labels contain multi-word technical terms (e.g., line 12 'NormStat/VecStat' is acceptable but borders on exceeding 2 words per line). Static structure maintained.

All infrastructure components present: Nomad (line 22), Consul Service Mesh (line 23), Vault Secrets Store (line 24), Prometheus Server (line 25), Langfuse Backend (line 26). Minor deduction: Nomad labeled as '3 nodes' instead of 'Manager/Client' as specified in criterion text.
Correct dependency flow: llm-switch containers initiate calls to external systems (lines 36-46). No reverse dependencies violating Technology Choices Section 7.2.
Vault shows 'secrets' annotation (line 17). External connections show HTTPS (line 48). Internal mesh shows 'mTLS via Consul Connect' (line 16).
All required patterns present: Circuit Breaker (line 30), Error Response paths (lines 34-35), Fallback to Local Model (line 32).

All routes documented in container description (line 11): /v1/* → Orchestrator, /health → Health Check, /metrics → Prometheus Exporter. Acceptable per criterion, though could be more explicit as diagram annotations.

Constraints visible in Nomad Job Definition (line 15): GPU required, Memory: 32GB, Node pool: llm-switch. Frontier Model Adapter shows 'GPU required' (line 14). Acceptable but could use more prominent visual annotations.

overall_summary: The c2-container.md architecture document is production-ready with valid Mermaid syntax, complete C4 Level 2 composition (all 10 required containers with technology stacks), and correct protocol specifications matching PRD Section 4.3. Error handling patterns (Circuit Breaker, Error Response paths, Fallback) are correctly implemented. Security compliance is complete with TLS/HTTPS annotations and Vault secrets labeling. Minor improvements recommended: Nomad infrastructure labeling could be more explicit ('Manager/Client'), and routing rules/constraints could use more prominent visual annotations rather than description text only.
